$comment: Configuration for gen_sdk_readmes.py. Quick start snippets live in codegen/sdk_readme_snippets/.

rust.title: GoudEngine Rust SDK
rust.description: Rust SDK for GoudEngine. Links directly against the engine with zero FFI overhead.
rust.architecture_note: Unlike the other SDKs which call through FFI, this crate re-exports `goud_engine::sdk::*` directly with zero overhead. A separate crate lets downstream projects depend on `goud-engine` without pulling in FFI exports, codegen build scripts, or napi dependencies.

csharp.title: GoudEngine C# SDK
csharp.description: Thin .NET 8.0 wrapper over GoudEngine's FFI layer via P/Invoke.
csharp.test_command:
cargo build --release
dotnet test sdks/csharp.tests/GoudEngine.Tests.csproj -v minimal
csharp.architecture_note: This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. `NativeMethods.g.cs` is auto-generated by csbindgen on `cargo build`. Do not hand-edit generated files.

python.title: GoudEngine Python SDK
python.description: Thin Python wrapper over GoudEngine's FFI layer via ctypes.
python.architecture_note: This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. ctypes declarations live in `generated/_ffi.py`. Generated by `codegen/gen_python.py` from `codegen/goud_sdk.schema.json`.

typescript.title: GoudEngine TypeScript SDK
typescript.description: TypeScript bindings for GoudEngine with two targets: Node.js desktop (napi-rs) and web browser (wasm-bindgen).
typescript.test_command:
cd sdks/typescript
npm test                # node --test test/*.test.mjs
npm run typecheck       # tsc --noEmit for both targets
typescript.architecture_note: This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. Files with `.g.rs` or `.g.ts` suffix are auto-generated by the codegen pipeline. Do not hand-edit generated files. Run `./codegen.sh` to regenerate.

c.title: GoudEngine C SDK
c.description: Header-only C layer over GoudEngine's generated `goud_engine.h` FFI surface.
c.install_label: Header-only. Build the native library, then include the staged headers:
c.test_command:
cargo build --release
# Link against libgoud_engine and run your test binary
c.architecture_note: This SDK is a header-only convenience layer -- all engine logic lives in Rust. `goud_engine.h` is the source of truth for the raw ABI. The C SDK adds `static inline` helpers for common workflows.

cpp.title: GoudEngine C++ SDK
cpp.description: Header-only C++17 RAII layer over GoudEngine's C SDK in `namespace goud`.
cpp.install_label:
### vcpkg

```bash
vcpkg install goud-engine
```

### Conan

```bash
conan install --requires=goud-engine/<VERSION>
```

### CMake (from source)

```cmake
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(MyGame LANGUAGES CXX)

set(GOUD_ENGINE_ROOT "/path/to/GoudEngine")
list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${GOUD_ENGINE_ROOT}/sdks/cpp/cmake")

find_package(GoudEngine REQUIRED)

add_executable(my_game main.cpp)
target_link_libraries(my_game PRIVATE GoudEngine::GoudEngine)
```

Build the native library first: `cargo build --release`
cpp.test_command:
cmake -B build -DGOUD_BUILD_TESTS=ON sdks/cpp
cmake --build build
ctest --test-dir build
cpp.architecture_note: This SDK is a header-only convenience layer -- all engine logic lives in Rust. It builds on top of the C SDK (`goud/goud.h`) and adds `goud::Error`, `goud::EngineConfig`, `goud::Context`, and `goud::Engine` RAII wrappers.

go.title: GoudEngine Go SDK
go.description: Thin Go wrapper over GoudEngine's FFI layer via cgo.
go.architecture_note: This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. All files in `goud/` and `internal/ffi/helpers.go` are auto-generated by `codegen/gen_go_sdk.py` and `codegen/gen_go.py`. Do not hand-edit generated files.

kotlin.title: GoudEngine Kotlin SDK
kotlin.description: Thin Kotlin/JVM wrapper over GoudEngine's FFI layer via JNI.
kotlin.install_label:
### Gradle (Maven Central)

```kotlin
dependencies {
    implementation("io.github.aram-devdocs:goudengine:0.0.839")
}
```

### From Source

```bash
cargo build --release -p goud-engine-core
python3 codegen/gen_kotlin.py
cd sdks/kotlin && ./gradlew build --no-daemon
```
kotlin.architecture_note: This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. JNI native declarations and wrapper classes are auto-generated by `codegen/gen_kotlin.py` from `codegen/goud_sdk.schema.json`. Do not hand-edit generated files.

swift.title: GoudEngine Swift SDK
swift.description: Thin Swift wrapper over GoudEngine's C FFI via Swift Package Manager. Targets macOS 13+ and iOS 16+.
swift.install_label:
Add as a local SwiftPM dependency:

```swift
dependencies: [
    .package(path: "../../sdks/swift"),
]
```

Requires the native engine library. Build it first:

```bash
cargo build --release
```
swift.architecture_note: This SDK is a thin wrapper -- all engine logic lives in Rust. All `.g.swift` files under `Sources/GoudEngine/generated/` are auto-generated by `codegen/gen_swift.py` from `codegen/goud_sdk.schema.json`. Do not hand-edit generated files.

lua.title: GoudEngine Lua SDK
lua.description: Lua scripting SDK for GoudEngine. Lua 5.4 is embedded inside the Rust engine via mlua, giving scripts direct access to rendering, physics, audio, and input.
lua.install_label:
### Embedded Runner (recommended)

```bash
cargo build --release
cargo run -p lua-runner -- main.lua
```

### LuaRocks

```bash
luarocks install goudengine
```
lua.architecture_note: This SDK is embedded -- unlike FFI-based SDKs, Lua runs inside the engine process via mlua. All engine logic lives in Rust. Constants modules are auto-generated by `codegen/gen_lua.py`. Do not hand-edit generated files.
